description:
Select and place a dental implant at the lower right first molar site (tooth #30) using Blue Sky Plan. Maximize the implant length while strictly maintaining a minimum 2.0 mm safety distance from the inferior alveolar nerve canal. Document the final distance between the implant apex and the nerve with a measurement ruler. Save a screenshot of the cross-section showing the implant, nerve, and measurement to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\implant_safety_check.png'. Save a text file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\implant_plan_data.txt' using the following format:
Available_Bone_Height_mm: [value]
Selected_Implant_Length_mm: [value]
Final_Safety_Gap_mm: [value]
